title: Front Office Manager - Devyani International - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Devyani International - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Devyani International is actively seeking a talented and motivated Front Office Manager to join our dynamic team in Mumbai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Devyani International:
Devyani International is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Customer Relations

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Devyani International!
